---
title: "Portfolio"
---

::: {#portfolio}
## Project name

![Thumbnail](https://placehold.co/400x250?text=thumbnail)

Short summary of what this is and why it matters. Replace this card with
your own; copy the block below to add more.

- [Repo](https://github.com/you/foo)
- [Writing](writings/src/foo.ipynb)
- [Blog post](https://example.com)
:::

::: {#portfolio}
## Another project

![Thumbnail](https://placehold.co/400x250?text=thumbnail)

Another short summary. The portfolio page is hand-maintained — this is the
one file you edit on the rare occasion a project is worth showcasing.

- [Repo](https://github.com/you/bar)
:::
